testcase.name: App loads correctly › page title is Wingman
App loads correctly › header shows brand name
App loads correctly › session list renders with sessions
App loads correctly › first session "Auth refactor" is active on load
App loads correctly › header shows active session name
App loads correctly › context panel is visible by default
App loads correctly › context tab is active in feature nav
App loads correctly › context editor is populated with session context
App loads correctly › status bar shows project path
App loads correctly › total prompts count is shown in sidebar
App loads correctly › save context button is hidden on load (editor is not dirty)
Session switching › clicking a different session marks it as active
Session switching › clicking a session updates the header session name
Session switching › clicking a session loads its context into the editor
Session switching › switching sessions clears the prompt editor
Session switching › switching sessions updates the status bar project path
Session switching › switching sessions updates the history list
Session switching › switching sessions hides the save context button
Context panel › context editor accepts text input
Context panel › typing in context editor shows live markdown preview
Context panel › markdown bold text renders in preview
Context panel › empty context editor shows placeholder preview
Context panel › char count updates as text is typed
Context panel › token count updates as text is typed
Context panel › save button is hidden when context is clean
Context panel › save button appears after editing context
Context panel › clicking save context button shows success toast
Context panel › clicking save context hides the save button
Context panel › toast disappears after ~2.5 seconds
Context panel › template button is visible in context editor toolbar
Context panel › clicking Template button fills the editor with template content
Context panel › clicking Template button shows a toast notification
Context panel › template button renders markdown preview after insertion
Prompts panel › clicking Prompts tab shows the prompts panel
Prompts panel › Prompts tab becomes active in feature nav
Prompts panel › switching back to context tab shows context panel
Prompts panel › history list renders prompt items for active session
Prompts panel › history items display prompt text
Prompts panel › prompt editor is visible and accepts text
Prompts panel › prompt char count updates as text is typed
Prompts panel › saving an empty prompt shows an info toast
Prompts panel › saving a prompt adds it to the history list
Prompts panel › saving a prompt shows a success toast
Prompts panel › saving a prompt clears the editor
Prompts panel › new prompt appears at top of history list
Prompts panel › clicking a history item loads text into the prompt editor
Prompts panel › clicking a history item shows a toast notification
Prompts panel › clicking a history item marks it as active
Prompts panel › clear button empties the prompt editor
Prompts panel › clear button resets the char count to 0
Prompts panel › search input is visible in history pane
Prompts panel › typing in search filters the history list
Prompts panel › search with no matches shows empty state message
Prompts panel › clearing search text restores all history items
New session modal › + button is visible in sidebar header
New session modal › clicking + opens the New Session modal
New session modal › New Session modal has a name input field
New session modal › Create button is disabled when name is empty
New session modal › Create button enables when name is typed
New session modal › Create button disables again when name is cleared
New session modal › new session modal cannot be dismissed by clicking backdrop (strict modal)
New session modal › new session modal cannot be dismissed by Escape key (strict modal)
New session modal › Cancel button closes the modal
New session modal › X close button closes the modal
New session modal › creating a session adds it to the session list
New session modal › new session appears at top of session list
New session modal › new session becomes the active session
New session modal › creating a session shows success toast
New session modal › creating a session closes the modal
New session modal › new session pre-populates context editor with template
New session modal › pressing Enter in name field triggers create
Help and Settings modals › hamburger menu button is visible in header
Help and Settings modals › clicking menu button opens the dropdown menu
Help and Settings modals › clicking elsewhere closes the dropdown menu
Help and Settings modals › menu shows Settings and Help items
Help and Settings modals › clicking Help menu item opens the Help modal
Help and Settings modals › Help modal shows "Getting Started" title
Help and Settings modals › Help modal contains terminal commands section
Help and Settings modals › Help modal contains keyboard shortcuts section
Help and Settings modals › Help modal Close button closes the modal
Help and Settings modals › Help modal X button closes the modal
Help and Settings modals › Help modal closes when Escape key is pressed (non-strict)
Help and Settings modals › Help modal closes when clicking the backdrop (non-strict)
Help and Settings modals › clicking Settings menu item opens the Settings modal
Help and Settings modals › Settings modal shows "Settings" title
Help and Settings modals › Settings modal has font size selector
Help and Settings modals › Settings modal has tab size selector
Help and Settings modals › Settings modal Cancel button closes without saving
Help and Settings modals › Settings modal cannot be dismissed by backdrop click (strict modal)
Help and Settings modals › Settings modal cannot be dismissed by Escape key (strict modal)
Help and Settings modals › saving settings closes the modal and shows toast
Help and Settings modals › changing font size and saving applies it to textareas
Keyboard shortcuts › Ctrl+1 switches to Session Context panel
Keyboard shortcuts › Ctrl+2 switches to Prompts panel
Keyboard shortcuts › Ctrl+1 when already on context panel keeps context panel active
Keyboard shortcuts › Ctrl+2 when already on prompts panel keeps prompts panel active
Keyboard shortcuts › Ctrl+Enter saves the prompt when on prompts panel
Keyboard shortcuts › Ctrl+Enter on empty prompt editor shows info toast
Keyboard shortcuts › Ctrl+Enter does not save when on context panel
Keyboard shortcuts › can toggle between panels multiple times with keyboard
